rationale: All required content is present and correct: exact title '2025 Revenue ($M)', four #5B8CFF-family bars with proportional heights (Q4 ~1.7x Q1), one-decimal value labels (8.2/9.1/11.4/14.0), thin baseline, and gray Q1-Q4 labels centered under their bars. The filmstrip shows the choreographed build: blank start, title in, bars growing left-to-right with a visible stagger and count-up labels riding the bar tops (1.9 -> 7.5/7.5/7.9/7.1 -> 13.4 -> final), a long hold matching the brief, and a blank final frame after the fade-out. Fidelity drops one point for small liberties: an unrequested 'Quarterly performance' subtitle and gridlines, gradient-filled bars rather than flat #5B8CFF, and the ~5.7s tile still near full opacity suggesting a late/abrupt fade-out. Composition is balanced and clean with strong typographic hierarchy and rounded bar tops; I would ship it as-is.
